user.description:
Set up your Eaton UPS with Network-M2 or Network-M3 card. Certificates will be generated automatically.

After setup, check **Settings → System → Repairs** for instructions to upload the client certificate to your UPS.

reauth_confirm.description: Re-authenticate your Eaton UPS connection. Leave certificate fields empty to auto-generate new certificates.

reconfigure.description: Reconfigure your Eaton UPS connection. Leave certificate fields empty to auto-generate new certificates.

error.connection: Unable to connect to the server.
error.cert_fetch_failed: Failed to fetch or generate certificates. Check that the host is reachable.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the UPS.

cert_upload_required.title: Upload client certificate to Eaton UPS
